(Siva). The next sign is tenated by Jupiter in
exaltation. The Sun is with Rahu. The Sun is also hemmed between enemies
as Saturn is in the 12th and Venus in the 2nd to him in Cancer. Here as Jupiter
is the soul, the Sun is the glorious splendour, Rahu the mouth, the world is
shown in the mouth. At the stomach portion represented by Leo is tenanted
by Venus and Mercury indicatirig devotion to Vishnu the name is one of
Vzsluut.
As the Sun is between enemies, the native's father will face great
danger at· second and 12th year· after the birth of this native which may

286 BHRlGU NANDI NADI
end in his death.
The placement of Mars and Saturn behind Jupiter and Rahu and the Sun
with him the native will have no brother or sister born either before or after
him.
CHART 435
As Mercury is conjunct Venus
and five houses ahead he contacts the Mars
lonely Ketu, the native will have spe
cialisation in accountancy and banking
etc., and will obtain high degrees Dh.
(B.Com, M.Com) etc.
Ven.
